allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 7588 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle, Path")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process app,node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name app -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-Process app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name app -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if \(Get-Process app -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { 'still running' } else { 'stopped' }")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name app -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output 'done'")

Bash(powershell -Command "if \(Test-Path C:\\bombo\) { cmd /c rmdir C:\\bombo }; New-Item -ItemType Junction -Path C:\\bombo -Target 'c:\\Users\\enes\\Desktop\\Enes\\kodumun projeleri\\BomboMusic' | Out-Null; Test-Path C:\\bombo\\package.json")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle -AutoSize")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\('png-to-ico'\); console.log\(typeof m\); console.log\(Object.keys\(m\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\('rcedit'\); console.log\('type:', typeof m\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(m\)\);")
Bash(powershell -Command "if \(Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { 'electron running' } else { 'not running' }")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 35332 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Write-Host "Port check:"; netstat -ano | Select-String ':5173'; Write-Host "Clearing session storage..."; $dir = "$env:APPDATA\\catalify"; foreach \($sub in 'Network','Local Storage','Session Storage','IndexedDB','Cache','Code Cache','Shared Dictionary','SharedStorage'\) { $p = Join-Path $dir $sub; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Remove-Item -Path $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "  cleared $sub" } }; Write-Host "Done.")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $line = netstat -ano | Select-String ':5173'; if \($line\) { Write-Host $line; $pid2 = \($line -split '\\s+'\)[-1]; Write-Host "Still listening. PID: $pid2"; Get-Process -Id $pid2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName | Format-List; Stop-Process -Id $pid2 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Write-Host "After kill:"; netstat -ano | Select-String ':5173' } else { Write-Host "Port 5173 is FREE" })
